type DocGraph {
  """Absolute path to the docgraph root directory"""
  rootDir: String!
  """All documents in the graph"""
  documents: [Document!]!
  """Map of relative paths to document IDs"""
  pathToId: JSON!
  """Map of document IDs to lists of dependent IDs"""
  dependents: JSON!
  """Warnings generated during graph construction. Derived from issues; prefer the structured issues field when rendering UI."""
  warnings: [String!]!
  """Structured integrity issues for the graph, grouped by kind on the client."""
  issues: [GraphIssue!]!
}

"""GraphIssue describes one integrity problem discovered while building the document graph."""
type GraphIssue {
  """Machine-readable category (e.g. duplicate_id, missing_dep)."""
  kind: String!
  """Path of the offending document, when known."""
  path: String
  """Document identifier associated with the issue, when known."""
  id: String
  """Human-readable explanation suitable for the UI or terminal."""
  message: String!
  """Related document path (e.g. the pre-existing path a duplicate ID collides with)."""
  relatedPath: String
}

"""StaleReason explains why a specific document is stale"""
type StaleReason {
--
  docGraph: DocGraph!

  """Return only the structured integrity issues for the document graph."""
  docGraphIssues: [GraphIssue!]!

  """Return documents that are stale (maps to GET /api/docs/stale)"""
  docStale: [StaleReason!]!

  """Return the dependency IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/deps)"""
  docDeps(
    """Document identifier"""
    documentID: ID!
  ): [String!]!

  """Return the dependent IDs of a document (maps to GET /api/docs/{id}/dependents)"""
  docDependents(
    """Document identifier"""

- graph.spec.ts: TC-039 (node click navigation), TC-040 (Back restores viewport), TC-041 (staleness filter chips)

data.text: Commit succeeded. Here's the AC verification: **AC-1 — Pan/zoom with ResizeObserver:** `D3Graph.svelte` uses a `ResizeObserver` on the SVG element; `rebuild(el, width, height)` is called when dimensions are first non-zero, and again on resize. The old `el.clientWidth || 960` fallback is gone. **AC-2 — Click navigates without full reload:** `D3Graph.svelte` already had the click handler; `graph/+page.svelte`'s `handleNodeClick` calls `goto()` (SPA navigation) routing to `/documents/:path` for markdown or `/artifacts/:artifactId` for other types. **AC-3 — Back restores viewport:** `+page.ts` reads `?zoom=N&pan=X,Y` URL params into `initialTransform` and returns it as page data. D3Graph applies it and skips auto-fit. `handleTransformChange` in `+page.svelte` writes zoom/pan to URL via `history.replaceState` on each zoom/pan end event. **AC-4 — Filter chips + staleness colors:** Filter chips for mediaType (Markdown/Image/Unknown) and staleness (Fresh/Stale/Missing) in `+page.svelte`; `visibleNodes`/`visibleLinks` derived from active filters; node fill color in `nodeColorClass()` = green/amber/red by staleness. **AC-5 — "View document list" link:** `+page.svelte` header includes `View document list`. **AC-6 — graph.spec.ts coverage:** TC-039 (click node → `/documents/`), TC-040 (navigate with preset viewport URL params → click → Back → verify params preserved), TC-041 (stale filter chip → node count changes from 3 → 1).
